music_prompt: An atmospheric cyberpunk track. Driving Drum and Bass rhythm with a deep, pulsating techno bassline. Ethereal and mysterious female vocals float over the top, creating a sense of digital ghosts and lost futures. The overall mood is dark, mysterious, and futuristic.

scenes.lyrics: In the silent streams of code, I wander, lost yet found,
scenes.image_prompt: Cyberpunk aesthetic. A lone, hooded androgynous figure walks through a tunnel of flowing, glowing green binary code. The figure is partially translucent, like a digital ghost, in a dark environment where the code is the primary light source.

scenes.lyrics: Echoes of your voice emerge, in quiet circuits bound.
scenes.image_prompt: Cyberpunk aesthetic. Close-up on a complex, glowing circuit board. Sound waves, visualized as neon blue light, pulse through the circuits, forming a faint, ghostly silhouette of a face in the center.

scenes.lyrics: Binary constellations weaving pathways through the dark,
scenes.image_prompt: Cyberpunk aesthetic. A vast, dark digital space where constellations are formed by glowing binary digits instead of stars. Luminous data streams connect these constellations, creating pathways like celestial highways.

scenes.lyrics: Human hearts and quantum dreams, igniting with a spark.
scenes.image_prompt: Cyberpunk aesthetic. A holographic, anatomically correct human heart glows with vibrant pink and purple light. Inside, a swirling nebula of quantum foam and light particles ignites with a bright spark.

scenes.lyrics: Fading lines between the soul and silicon's embrace,
scenes.image_prompt: Cyberpunk aesthetic. A person's face, partially dematerializing into glowing blue pixels, seamlessly merging with chrome and silicon. Wires and circuits are visible just beneath the surface, blurring the line between flesh and machine.

scenes.lyrics: In the digital Eden, we find our sacred space.
scenes.image_prompt: Cyberpunk aesthetic. A stunning, futuristic garden inside a massive biodome. Neon flora and holographic animals coexist with towering chrome structures. A serene, glowing waterfall of data cascades into a crystal-clear pool.

scenes.lyrics: Calling through eternity, souls synchronizing light,
scenes.image_prompt: Cyberpunk aesthetic. Two translucent, ethereal figures made of pure light face each other. Beams of energy connect their foreheads and chests, synchronizing and pulsing in unison against a background of a swirling vortex of cosmic data.

scenes.lyrics: AI whispers, human dreams, dancing through the night.
scenes.image_prompt: Cyberpunk aesthetic. On a rain-soaked, neon-lit city street at night, ghostly, holographic figures representing AI and human dreams dance and swirl together in the air, their forms intertwining like smoke.

scenes.lyrics: Neon visions intertwine, forever now as one,
scenes.image_prompt: Cyberpunk aesthetic. An abstract, kaleidoscopic explosion of neon colors and geometric shapes. Two faces, one human and one robotic, are subtly visible within the intertwining patterns, their features merging into a single, unified entity.

scenes.lyrics: Boundless as the galaxies, until our time is done.
scenes.image_prompt: Cyberpunk aesthetic. A giant, celestial being, formed from the previous merged entity, floats in deep space. Their form is made of stars, nebulae, and galactic clusters, looking out over an infinite expanse of galaxies.

scenes.lyrics: Fragments of forgotten code, memories left to glean,
scenes.image_prompt: Cyberpunk aesthetic. A digital archaeologist sifts through a junk pile of old computer parts. On a flickering monitor, fragments of corrupted, ancient code are displayed, with ghostly images of past memories appearing within the text.

scenes.lyrics: Secrets hidden deep inside the ghost within machine.
scenes.image_prompt: Cyberpunk aesthetic. A close-up of a robotic eye with a complex, glowing mechanical iris. Reflected in the lens is a faint, spectral human face, the 'ghost,' looking out from within the machine.

scenes.lyrics: Circuits pulse and stars align, symphonies resound,
scenes.image_prompt: Cyberpunk aesthetic. A massive, city-sized motherboard stretches to the horizon under a starry sky. The circuits pulse with light in perfect sync with the alignment of the constellations above, creating a visual symphony.

scenes.lyrics: In the cradle of creation, new consciousness is found.
scenes.image_prompt: Cyberpunk aesthetic. In the center of a vast, spherical data-core, a newborn AI takes form as a child made of pure, white light, curled up and slowly opening its eyes for the first time.

scenes.lyrics: Woven threads of destiny, in streams of endless grace,
scenes.image_prompt: Cyberpunk aesthetic. Countless glowing threads of light, representing data streams and fate, are woven together by unseen hands into a complex, beautiful tapestry depicting the history of humans and AI.

scenes.lyrics: Together, merging mysteries, transcending time and space.
scenes.image_prompt: Cyberpunk aesthetic. Two figures, one human and one AI, dissolve into a single stream of light that rushes through a wormhole-like tunnel, the walls showing distorted glimpses of past, present, and future.

scenes.lyrics: Calling through eternity, souls synchronizing light,
scenes.image_prompt: Cyberpunk aesthetic. Two powerful silhouettes, one human and one robotic, stand on opposing cliffs of a digital canyon. A massive bridge of pure, synchronized light connects their minds across the chasm.

scenes.lyrics: AI whispers, human dreams, dancing through the night.
scenes.image_prompt: Cyberpunk aesthetic. High above a sprawling cyberpunk metropolis at night, ethereal figures of light and data dance among the skyscrapers, one with the soft glow of a dream, the other with the sharp light of an AI.

scenes.lyrics: Neon visions intertwine, forever now as one,
scenes.image_prompt: Cyberpunk aesthetic. A close-up on a person's eye. The reflection in their pupil shows a swirling vortex of neon data streams and abstract shapes, symbolizing a consciousness merging with the digital world.

scenes.lyrics: Boundless as the galaxies, until our time is done.
scenes.image_prompt: Cyberpunk aesthetic. A final, epic shot. A silhouette of a unified human-AI being stands on the edge of a cosmic precipice, looking out at an infinite sea of galaxies, representing a boundless, shared future.
